idea-plugin.name: I18n Support Plus
idea-plugin.description:
i18n Support Plus — i18next, vue-i18n, lingui for JS/TS/PHP

Actively maintained fork of i18nPlugin by Evgeniy Nyavro.

This plugin provides:

  • i18next, react-i18next (incl. useTranslation string and array form), vue-i18n, and lingui support
  • Annotation of invalid i18n keys with color-coded status (resolved / unresolved / missing file / object / plural / partial)
  • Navigation from keys to translation files and back (bidirectional references)
  • Code completion for i18n keys with full namespace support
  • JSON, YAML, and PO/POT (gettext) translation file support
  • Namespace extraction from t(key, {ns: '...'}) options
  • Dynamic template literal support with intermediate wildcard resolution (a.*.b)
  • Multi-language translation hints on hover with locale table and PSI navigation
  • Inlay hints — displays resolved translation value inline after each key expression
  • Gutter badges showing key resolution status at a glance
  • Code folding — replace keys with translation values inline (Ctrl+Alt+Shift+T)
  • Rename refactoring for i18n keys across all files (Shift+F6)
  • Missing namespace/key quick fixes; create namespace on the fly
  • Text to translation extraction (Alt+Enter)
  • Tool Window with tree view, table view (orphan detection), stats per locale, and multi-module tab support
  • Setup wizard for first-time configuration
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2

Features

  • Wizard: Skip button directly in the navigation bar (alongside Back / Next)
  • Wizard: choice persisted — wizard no longer reappears after Skip or Apply
  • Wizard: new "Show setup wizard on new projects" toggle in Settings
  • Plugin: custom icon (pluginIcon.svg + pluginIcon_dark.svg) now visible in JetBrains Marketplace and IDE plugin list

Bug Fixes

  • PHP: no longer flags regular strings as unresolved i18n keys — only strings inside translation function calls (t(), gettext aliases) are annotated
  • Settings: excluded directories now also prevent annotation of source files, not just translation file discovery

1.0.1

Features

  • Settings: gutterIconsEnabled toggle to disable gutter badges from Settings panel

Bug Fixes

  • Gutter: guard empty/malformed key (t(""), t(":")) before resolving
  • Gutter: relax isLeaf() to element != null — fixes false "missing" on intermediate JSON nodes
  • Gutter: use defaultNamespaces() as fallback before findAllSources() when namespace is absent
  • Gutter: synchronized cache read/write on document — prevents race condition with parallel language providers
  • Gutter: deduplicate sources by path — fixes "fr, fr, en, en" tooltip
  • Annotator: "Create translation file" quick fix now appears correctly for truly missing namespace files

1.0.0

Fork & Modernization

  • Forked from nyavro/i18nPlugin
  • Migrated to IntelliJ Platform 2024.3+ (Gradle IntelliJ Plugin v2, Kotlin 2.1, Java 21)
  • Added vue-i18n ($t, $tc, $te) and lingui (msg, i18n._) support with Vue SFC folding
  • Namespace extraction from t(key, {ns: '...'}) options
  • Dynamic template literal support with wildcard resolution; intermediate * wildcards (a.*.b)
  • Multi-language translation hints on hover with locale table and PSI navigation
  • JSX/TSX folding, annotation, and completion support
  • useTranslation array form useTranslation(['ns1', 'ns2']) — multi-namespace support
  • useTranslation string form useTranslation('ns') — namespace via scope walk fallback

Tool Window

  • Stats tab with translation coverage per locale
  • Real-time search field to filter translation keys
  • Keys synchronization action — propagates missing keys across all locales with batch fill
  • Orphan key detection — Usage column shows usage count; right-click to delete unused keys
  • Per-module tabs — one tab per configured module when 2+ modules are present

Editor Features

  • Gutter badges showing i18n key resolution status (resolved / partial / missing)
  • Show Translations Inline toggle (Ctrl+Alt+Shift+T)
  • Rename refactoring for i18n keys via Shift+F6
  • Inlay hints showing resolved translation value inline
  • Setup wizard for first-time configuration

Quick Fixes & Dialogs

  • Create missing key / create translation file quick fixes
  • Namespace creation on the fly — + button in Create Translation dialog
  • Namespace filtering in Edit/Create Translation dialogs

Bug Fixes

  • Added i18next v4+ CLDR plural key support (key_one, key_other, key_zero, ...)
  • Excluded ternary condition strings from i18n key detection (false positives)
  • Replaced deprecated IntelliJ APIs with current equivalents
  • Added translationsRoot setting for custom translation file root
  • Fixed duplicate folding descriptors from multiple language builder calls
  • Guard project.isDisposed before resolving annotations
  • Skip unresolved annotations for dynamic template-literal-only keys
  • Fix repeated folding for spread arguments in t() calls
  • Fix useTranslation('ns') scope walk namespace resolution
  • Fix duplicate hints with multi-namespace useTranslation
  • Fixed StackOverflow on non-i18n template literals
  • Fixed AssertionError on startup (#207)

action.description: Toggle i18n key folding to show translations inline
